events.title: A quiet escape in the heart of the city returns!
events.description:
A quiet escape in the heart of the city returns! 
The Morgan Garden reopens this Friday, May 1, and will be open with museum admission during public hours every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday through November 1, 2026.

Tucked in front of the historic library, the Garden offers one of New York’s most elegant greenspaces, where periwinkle beds line the loggia, bluestone pathways echo Renaissance floor

events.title: “you can even add a head kick” — @markmcthomas (because why not?)
events.description:
“you can even add a head kick” — @markmcthomas (because why not?)

Extra time to train with Mark this week — take class with him every Friday at 12:30pm and this Saturday, 4/4 at 11:30am and 12:30pm! 💥 

pls note: gloves or wraps are required! if you don’t have your own, we’ve got machine washed rentals. 🥊 (Mark didn’t wear them to film, but they are required for class!)
